    management-system-for-multi-shelter-animal-adoption 1.0-SNAPSHOT API

    Packages
    Package
    Description
    shelter.application
    Application layer — orchestrates use cases by coordinating domain objects and services.
    shelter.application.impl
    Concrete implementations of the application-layer use-case interfaces.
    shelter.application.model
    Read-only view objects returned by the application layer to the presentation layer.
    shelter.cli
    Presentation layer — Picocli-based CLI entry points for all shelter management commands.
    shelter.cli.print
    Rendering utilities for the shelter print dashboard command.
    shelter.domain
    Domain layer — core entities and value objects that model the animal adoption problem.
    shelter.exception
    Domain-specific checked and unchecked exceptions thrown across the service and application layers.
    shelter.repository
    Repository interfaces that abstract persistent storage for each aggregate root.
    shelter.repository.csv
    CSV-backed implementations of the repository interfaces.
    shelter.service
    Service-layer interfaces defining single-responsibility business operations.
    shelter.service.impl
    Concrete implementations of the service-layer interfaces.
    shelter.service.model
    Lightweight result and record types produced and consumed within the service layer.
    shelter.startup
    Startup and dependency-wiring infrastructure for the CLI application.
    shelter.strategy
    Strategy layer — pluggable scoring rules for animal-adopter matching.
